name: Robin Lu
heroLeadPrefix: 一名在科隆学习商业心理学的
heroLeadSecondLine: 也持续把想法做成项目、文字与表达。
heroLeadSecondLineEn: while continuously turning ideas into projects, writing, and expression.

heroDescriptionParagraphs.zh: 我关注人的行为、产品体验，以及信息如何被更好地理解。
heroDescriptionParagraphs.en: I pay attention to human behavior, product experience, and how information can be understood more clearly.

heroDescriptionParagraphs.zh: 这里记录我的作品、观察，以及日常生活里那些值得被留下来的片段。
heroDescriptionParagraphs.en: This is where I keep my work, observations, and the fragments of everyday life that feel worth holding onto.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 我目前生活在科隆，主修 Business Psychology。相比只停留在概念层面，我更喜欢把想法变成具体的东西：有时是一个小项目，有时是一篇文章，有时只是一次被认真记录下来的观察。
aboutParagraphs.en: I currently live in Cologne and study Business Psychology. Rather than leaving ideas at the level of concepts, I prefer turning them into something concrete: sometimes a small project, sometimes an essay, and sometimes simply an observation carefully recorded.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 这个网站，是我把不同部分放在同一个地方的方式。这里有我做过的作品与 side projects，也有一些关于产品、技术、城市生活与个人成长的思考，以及那些构成我日常的小片段。
aboutParagraphs.en: This website is my way of placing different parts of myself in one place. Here you will find work and side projects I have made, thoughts on products, technology, city life, and personal growth, together with the small fragments that shape my everyday life.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 我一直在意的，是把复杂的事情讲清楚，把零散的信息整理出秩序，也尽可能做出一些真实、有用、并且能被感受到温度的内容。无论是写作、设计，还是搭建一个页面，我都希望表达是简单而诚实的。
aboutParagraphs.en: What I care about most is explaining complex things clearly, bringing order to scattered information, and making things that feel real, useful, and warm. Whether I am writing, designing, or building a page, I hope the expression stays simple and honest.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 如果你是因为某个项目、某篇文章，或一次偶然的推荐来到这里，希望你能在这里看到一点对你有帮助的内容——哪怕只是一个新的想法，或者一个让你愿意停留几秒钟的瞬间。
aboutParagraphs.en: If you arrived here because of a project, an article, or a recommendation that happened to bring you here, I hope you will find something helpful here, even if it is only a new idea or a moment that makes you want to stay for a few more seconds.

aboutParagraphs.zh: 如果你也喜欢交流想法，或愿意聊聊合作与有趣的项目，欢迎继续往下看。还有，如果你喜欢猫，那你大概会在这个网站里发现一个小彩蛋。至于入口藏在哪，就留给你自己去找了。
aboutParagraphs.en: If you also enjoy exchanging ideas, or would like to talk about collaboration and interesting projects, feel free to keep exploring. And if you like cats, you may discover a small easter egg somewhere on this website. As for where the entrance is hidden, I will leave that for you to find yourself.
